poses.name: High Arch Presentation
poses.description: Standing on tiptoes, elegant high arches, soles prominently displayed, legs slightly apart

poses.name: Sole Close-up Worship
poses.description: Lying on back with feet raised toward viewer, detailed soles and toes in focus, vulnerable and inviting pose

poses.name: Crossed Legs Tease
poses.description: Sitting with legs elegantly crossed, one foot dangling, showing both top and sole subtly
